meta.description: OpenProse runtime conformance capability vocabulary and profile definitions

file-io.description: Read and write files with stable paths

tool-exec.description: Execute tool calls or shell commands

workspace-bindings.description: Maintain separate private workspace and public bindings trees

copy-on-return.description: Publish declared outputs from workspace into bindings

state-markers.description: Record append-only run state and execution progress

error-signaling.description: Detect and propagate __error.md and declared errors

dependency-scheduling.description: Wait for inputs and execute services in dependency order

parallel.description: Run independent services concurrently when the manifest allows

max_concurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent services tested

environment.description: Validate required environment variables before execution

delegation.description: Support runtime Delegate: / Request: yield-resume behavior

persistence-execution.description: Persist agent memory for the lifetime of one run

persistence-project.description: Persist agent memory across runs inside one project

persistence-user.description: Persist agent memory across projects for one user

ask-user.description: Prompt for missing caller inputs when required

test-execution.description: Execute kind: test subjects and collect artifacts

test-evaluation.description: Evaluate expects:/expects-not: clauses (may require model judgment)

deterministic_only.description: If true, only exact-match expects clauses were tested, not fuzzy/semantic

resume.description: Resume interrupted runs from artifacts and state.md

secret-hygiene.description: Verify environment presence without leaking raw secret values into artifacts or logs

core.description: Minimum profile for executing normal OpenProse programs with deterministic artifact handling

persistence.description: Agent memory persistence (each scope certified separately)

tests.description: Execute kind: test subjects and collect artifacts for external verification

resume.description: Resume interrupted runs from artifacts and state markers
